## [00:00 - 02:30]

What is going on guys? So like I mentioned, there are three methods of video prospecting that we typically use that can dramatically improve your prospecting experience. So the first one is through lead generation. So for this process, what we typically do is we use a software called Loom. And Loom is a video recording software that allows you to record both your webcam and your screen or just one of the above. And what we do is we create videos that add some value to a prospect. So the key here is adding value. It's not pitching. You don't want to pitch on this call at all. But typically what you want to do is review some of their ads, check out some of their ads, and maybe give some recommendations on their ads. You might want to point out some pixel misfiring. So if they have a pixel that's installed or pixel that's not installed, you want to point out that, hey, your Facebook pixel isn't installed. And you also want to point out, hey, you know what? It's not firing as it should be. The last one you might want to do is just give some general ideas and general advice on what people might be able to do using Facebook ads. Again, you don't want to pitch on these videos. So each video should be about three to 10 minutes in length. And here's how we typically start. So the first step is finding the prospect. So there's three different methods that we've used to find our prospects. Number one is through Instagram search. So Instagram obviously is massively powerful and a lot of brands are posting on there. So what you're able to do is you're just able to pull up your search bar in Instagram and say sunglasses or physicians or lawyers in Vancouver or whatever it might be. You're able to just look specifically for one specific type of product. And then from there you're able to see, okay, who are those people engaging with? The Instagram search feature is really, really powerful in that sense. The next one is an obvious one, but it's Google search. So searching for people and companies within your general location can get some fantastic prospects. So lawyers in Vancouver or lawyers in Florida or lawyers in LA, wherever it might be, if you're searching that specific area, it can be really, really powerful as well. The next one is one we're going to create a separate video for, but it's using similar web in order to generate more leads on top of some of the ones that you've already found. So stay tuned for that video.
